reviews.title: Very peaceful and excellent 3-night stay
reviews.positives:
Very professional staff and a really excellent room. Huge bed. Good hygiene. A large window that could be opened.  Very easy and comfortable aircon and no troublesome light sources in the rooms from fire or other equipment.  A very peaceful and happy 3 nights.

I escaped to the Mercure La Gare after very bad experiences at cheaper hotels.  The standards in Hanoi are low for lower-class hotels, the photographs are extremely deceptive, the managers can be aggressive and awful.  To avoid risk, stress and financial loss, stay at higher class hotels such as this one.
reviews.negatives:
Insufficient care / management of the breakfast area.  Chair was dirty with food and had cigarette burns.  Various items on the table, napkins holder etc, dirty and not correctly placed.  Table mat cheap plastic and frayed.  At this price point, I think these points should be fixed.  Perhaps management are not aware that there is a problem.  At first glance, it all looks "fine"?

There is an overall liking / trend for large and mixed breakfast buffets served at all big hotels of this class.  This is enjoyed by 90% or more of all travellers and guests, but not by this guest.  I wanted ONE high-quality coffee and ONE high-quality croissant or pastry.  I could have had 100 coffees and 100 different foods, but NOT of a high quality.  After day one, I no longer went to breakfast.  

Since there are more coffee shops in Hanoi per head of population than anywhere else on earth, finding good coffee is not a problem.   :-)

reviews.title: Do not get mislead - not worth the money
reviews.text: Mercurre was the first hotel we stayed in Vietnam and thought it is the max. standard and service we can get. Nothing more misleading. Simply try any other hotels, especially the small once of boutique nature and you will easily see the real value for money. Room we got was very small and in the bathroom it was really difficult to move, not to mentioned, have a shower. There was no breakfast included in the price and the price quoted for it to be paid extra was far too high - go to any restaurant of very good standard and you will pay less. It is visible that employees require a bit more training on customer service and handling standard situations - if we had not asked for the return of VISA card receipt (blocked at check in) we would not have got it. The reception clearly did not seem to be acquainted with the process and we got it back after some consultations. No welcome drinks, no small nice attributes that we got at 3star hotels of much nicer interior and better standard. It is 15 minutes of walk to get to the Lake and the Old Quarter, so it is not in the closes vicinity of Hanoi's heart.

reviews.title: Minus the dodgy check in, rest met my expectations
reviews.text:
My stay in Mercure Hanoi La Gare, met my expectations. Clean and comfortable rooms. Basic necessities were available. Relatively nice breakfast buffet. Centrally located. 

However, i would like to highlight on 2 factors, that were disappointing. When i was checking in, the counter staff, an assistant manager, informed me that a guest who was to check out had to extend his stay due to being ill and that the hotel was also fully booked. Due to this, the staff had asked me to consider her offer of being transferred to another hotel under the mercure group. That hotel was 3 km away. I declined the offer and insisted that i wanted to stay in this hotel. Upon that, instantly she responded, yes i do have a room. This encounter just left me puzzled. Why should the staff mention that they are fully booked, when they do have an available room? This appears dishonest and does not reflect well on an international hotel, such as Mercure. 

The other disappointing factor is that, when i had emailed the hotel for the price of the airport transfer, i was told that it would cost USD 55, which is very expensive compared to the market rate of USD 17 for airport transfer in Hanoi.
reviews.positives: centrally located, fairly nice breakfast buffet, clean and comfortable rooms.

reviews.title: the worst hotel experiences I have ever had
reviews.text:
This was one of the worst hotel experiences I have ever had with an Accor property. The service and attitude of the front desk staff were extremely unprofessional – from handling simple issues to assisting guests with basic requests.
	•	Check-in process:
Our group had an additional guest. Instead of explaining the policy and offering solutions (we were willing to pay any extra charges), the staff simply said “not possible.” Only after I asked, “So do you expect my family member to sleep on the street or move to another hotel?” did they finally call Sales/Management to resolve the matter. This is not the standard I expect from an international hotel chain.
	•	Room arrangement:
Because we had children in our group, we requested to prioritize rooms for them. We provided all required IDs and had already arranged who would stay in which room. However, the front desk kept calling multiple times (up to 3–4 times) to ask the same questions again and again. Even worse, after all these confirmations, the staff still could not identify which rooms our group was staying in. Is this really the “Accor standard”?
	•	The worst experience – key card issue:
When I forgot my room key and went to reception for a replacement, I expected a standard verification process (confirming the guest’s name). That is reasonable. However, despite giving my correct name, then reading almost all names in our group (5 rooms in total), the staff repeatedly said “no record.” This was clearly an internal system/update issue, yet the staff insisted on arguing with me instead of finding a solution.
In particular, one staff member, ***, showed a condescending attitude, unfriendly manner, and not even a single smile. It felt as if he wanted to “prove me wrong” rather than assist a guest.

👉 I rarely leave reviews, but this experience was unacceptable. The service at Mercure was extremely disappointing. With such unprofessional and arrogant behavior from the front desk, I can confidently say: I will never return.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Katherine Ng,
We sincerely apologize for the experience you had during your stay. Your feedback regarding our front desk service, check-in, and room arrangements has been taken seriously, and immediate actions are being implemented to improve our procedures and staff training. We deeply regret that we did not meet your expectations and appreciate your comments to help us improve.
Sincerely,
Nga Vo (Ms.)
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Nice hotel but too smokey and noisy!!
reviews.text:
my partner and i stayed here for 3 nights, and didn't sleep a wink. it was very frustrating cause we had a lot planned for our time there, and being sleep-deprived every day didn't help.
while the hotel is located close to some good sites, it is also across the road from the train station. the train goes for all hours and has an extremely loud horn- which they use frequently- not caring what time it is! 
the hotel had lovely staff and were very friendly, welcoming, and helpful! although the hotel rates for halong bay for a one day tour were through the roof- they charge $127 for a full day trip. i booked the same tour directly from the singh tourist for $23.
our rooms were clean and we had a comfortable bed and clean bathroom, it was ashame we couldn't enjoy it. people also smoke like chimneys in the hallways and since there aren't any windows there (and the ones in the rooms are locked and don't open) it was suffocating. asthmatics beware!! no free wifi either.
reviews.positives: Close to temple of literature and one pillar pagoda

Pros
 -Near halal restaurant. D'lion and minimart. Abt 2min walk. 
-Friendly staff
-Housekeeping staff were efficient and  fast
-Clean room n love the fragrance scented aroma they place near the lift. It's refreshing.



Cons
-No bidet
-Toothbrush n paste was a like paper kind wood recycled material. It felt n taste weird. Wld recommend bringing own Toothbrush. 
-Breakfast was bland and not much varieties.
-food hygiene / preparation can be improved. 
-Pillow too soft. U can take one more pillow from wardrobe
-No laudromat nearby. They have laundry service though.
reviews.response:
Dear Syamsah,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your stay at Mercure Hanoi La Gare.

We’re pleased to hear that you appreciated our friendly team, clean rooms, the efficient housekeeping service, and our convenient location near halal dining options. It’s also wonderful to know you enjoyed the refreshing scent near the lift area—thank you for noticing those little details!

We also truly value your constructive comments. Your feedback regarding the breakfast, amenities, and pillow comfort has been noted, and we will share this with the relevant departments for improvement. We're sorry that some aspects did not meet your expectations and will work hard to enhance the guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide you with a more satisfying stay next time.

Sincerely,
Nga Vo (Ms.)
Front Office Manager

More a hotel for a short transit stop than a long stay, but none the worse for that. I’d use it again.

reviews.title: A safe and stable hotel.
reviews.text:
I stayed for 11 nights on a business trip. On the first day, while filling the bathtub with water, the hot water stopped coming out halfway. After having the staff come to fix it, I was told it would be usable after 20 minutes, and the hot water started flowing again. This continued for the next day and the day after, and when I complained at the front desk and requested a fundamental repair, it was completely fixed the next day, and I was able to use it without any issues thereafter. I appreciate the proper response from all the staff members. However, I wish they had checked it in advance. 

The front desk, restaurant, and cleaning staff were all very polite and provided proper service. This reflects the Accor Hotels quality. 

The room was very clean and functional, although the bathroom was a bit small. Some rooms have bathtubs and some do not, so it's better to request one if needed. 

The location is very convenient, as it's near Hanoi Station and within walking distance of the Old Quarter, with several good Vietnamese restaurants nearby, as well as craft beer restaurants. 

Most guests were European and American tour travelers, with few business users. I would like to stay at this hotel again.

reviews.title: Arrependimento, a ponto de sair antes do prazo mesmo com diária paga.
reviews.positives: O hotel atendeu no quesito limpeza e internet.  O acesso ao lobby tem rampa. Há 2 elevadores com bom espaço. O espaço do café da manhã é amplo, bem atendido e tem segue o padrão da linha Mercure. O corredor dos quartos é bem iluminado e largo.
reviews.negatives: Sou associada da Rede Accor e uso com frequência a rede Mercure, mas esse não valeu o custo-benefício, inclusive não deveria figurar como 4 estrelas (no máximo 3). A localização do hotel fica numa área degradada, as opções de restaurantes e comércio próximos são limitadas e fecham cedo. Não me senti segura para andar nos arredores após o escurecer. O atendimento na recepção não é muito simpático. Ainda, indicaram um agente de turismo que nos colocou num grupo para um cruzeiro em Lan Ha que foi uma roubada (o barco estava em obras, não tendo condições de receber passageiros) e estamos aguardando se vão nos ressarcir como acordado. O banheiro do quarto foi uma decepção: a pia é muito baixa e espirra água quando ligada, quase não há espaço na bancada para acomodar escovas e sabonetes, a porta do banheiro não oferece privacidade! A luz no banheiro incomoda quem dorme no quarto pois parte da parede é de vidro sem cortina. Também incomoda a luz de stand-by da tv e do controle do ar condicionado (tive que cobrir para conseguir dormir). Preferi sair antes do final do período pré-pago para ir para outra área da cidade. Arrependimento grande de ter feito essa reserva, tentei negociar para sair antes do prazo (mesmo que tivesse pequena multa) mas não houve flexibilidade do hotel, nem suporte do Booking (considerando que no site a informação sobre a localização do hotel não condizia com a realidade). E por ter feito a reserva pelo site do Booking sequer pude computar meus pontos. Enfim, muitos pontos a considerar como lição aprendida - e arrependida - para evitar em futuras viagens.

reviews.title: Warm Service in a Cool Location – Mercure La Gare
reviews.text:
👍 What’s Good:
1. Great Location
Just 5–8 minutes’ walk to Train Street and the start of the Old Quarter. Quiet area but close to all the action.

2. Comfortable Room
Stayed in a Superior Room — clean, good size, tidy, and comfortable. Two free bottles of water every day. No issues here.

3. Friendly Staff
Staff were kind, helpful, and knew their stuff. Big thanks to Dat at the front desk who really tried to help us with the Wi-Fi.

👎 What Can Be Better:
1. Poor Wi-Fi in Room
Wi-Fi looked strong, but there was no real connection. We were in a corner room — I had to sit in the hallway or restaurant to work. Wi-Fi access points are only in the corridor, not in the rooms. Not great if you need to stay connected.

2. Shower Design
No shower door. Water splashes everywhere, so the bathroom floor gets really wet.

3. Outdated TVs
TVs are old. Not a big deal, but don’t expect smart features or streaming.

📝 Final Thoughts:
Mercure La Gare is a solid choice if you want comfort and great service in a good location. Wi-Fi needs work, especially for business or remote work. Staff were excellent and made the stay better.

Would I stay again? Yes — but I’d bring a portable Wi-Fi just in case.

reviews.text:
Là không có vòi xịt rửa đít. Tôi đã là thành viên của Accord nhiều năm nhưng Hãng vẫn kiên quyết theo kiểu Singapore là không có vòi xịt rửa đít.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Location is great, still within the Old Quarter yet still quiet, away from the congestion/pollution. It's on the same street (maybe 2 mins walk) from the Hanoi Train station. 
Bed is comfortable and rooms are clean and good sized.

Only improvement point was on the service.  Was told during check-in that breakfast was included. The next morning we went to the restaurant, told the staff our room number and was let in. As we just started picking up our food and eating only then was told we didnt have breakfast with our room booking and have to pay breakfast charges. Since we already took food, we then paid. Standard SOP should have been checked before letting us in to the restaurant right?
We then went to clarify at the front desk, and was told, "We are sorry, our colleague made a mistake yesterday".
reviews.response:
Dear Fui,
We very much appreciate your comments regarding your stay at the Mercure Hanoi la Gare. 
It is always a pleasure to receive positive feedback. I will share your comments with our team. I am sure that this feedback will serve as an encouragement to all of our staff as we strive to continuously improve the quality of our services.
Thank you again for sharing your experience, and we hope your next visit will be as pleasant as the previous one.
Sincerely,
Nga Vo (Ms.)
Assistant Front Office Manager
h7049-fo@accor.com

reviews.text: Perfect value for money business solution for Hanoi. Conference room facilities were very good, dining good, staff performance excellent and room very comfortable...all excellent value for money. Will stay again.

reviews.title: pleasant stay with great experience
reviews.text:
it was pleasant stay with very modern hotel facility (many hotels in HN are quite old)
the breakfast menu is very limited - better walk to a nearby coffeeshop
reviews.positives: location, very modern facility, good staff

reviews.title: The hotel is nice and the staff are helpful!
reviews.text: I really appreciate the attitude of the staff. It is also very convenient that we can exchange the money at the hotel. The location is not the best one, as it takes some walk to get to the lake and the old street. However, it is very close to the train station and it is a big advantage for someone who need to get the overnight train.
reviews.positives: Staff  are helpful and friendly. The room is a bit small but it is comfortable and clean.

reviews.title: Good hotel, cheap and perfect location!

reviews.title: brand new hotel, good location,
reviews.text: This is a brand new hotel. It locates in a good location, easy to go to down town. Clean room, nice design. Very friendly and helpful staff
reviews.positives: Great staff, nice room, good location

reviews.title: Great location next to railway station.
reviews.text:
Excellent stay, we booked our room at half the rate through agoda compared to our friends who booked through a travel agent.
Staff friendly, attentive and very professional.
Room size excellent, lovely bathroom, comfortable bed, free wifi worked well.
We used the bar facilities but only a very small area attached to the restaurant.
reviews.positives: Great room, professional attentive staff, easy walking distance to many attractions

reviews.title: Nice Place to stay _ Mercure Hanoi
reviews.text: Very clean since the hotel opened on Sep 1st, 2009. The location is a kind of center of Hanoi. Reasonable pricing (Sorry for not having swimming pool)
reviews.positives:
The bed is pretty cosy and comfortable.
The room is very quite for good rest and good sleep
The price of the room is quite reasonable
You can see the exchange rate very easily through 2 Samsung LCD TV on the front of the hotel at lobby
Air conditioner is quite so you don't have to be bothered by noisy sound from the machine
reviews.negatives: There is no swimming pool and no billiard pool

reviews.title: Feedback Mercure Hanoi La Gare Hotel
reviews.text:
Stayed 2 nights at Mercure Hanoi hotel. 

Overall, excellent service from the staff members, from Bellboy, reception to chambermaid. Location is quite good as it is located very near to the train station.  But have to walk about 25 mins to Hoan Kiem Lake.  However, it is a pleasant stroll to get to know the city. 

Room is very quiet as it has double layer window to shut the noise. So had comfortable sleep. 

Get good value for money from the stay.  Will definitely stay there again in future.
